name: baoyu-diagram
description: Create professional, dark-themed SVG diagrams of any type — architecture diagrams, flowcharts, sequence diagrams, structural diagrams, mind maps, timelines, illustrative/conceptual diagrams, and more. Use this skill whenever the user asks for any kind of technical or conceptual diagram, visualization of a system, process flow, data flow, component relationship, network topology, decision tree, org chart, state machine, or any visual representation of structure/logic/process. Also trigger when th
author: JimLiu
summary_zh: 这是一款生成专业深色系SVG图表的工具，适合需要把复杂的系统架构、业务流程或抽象逻辑转化为直观视觉图像的场景，帮你轻松搞定各类技术与概念图。
